converted from EAD 1.0 to EAD 2002 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Nancy Booker Morey papers
Morey, Nancy Booker, 1903-
23-14-1465
.1 cubic feet. .1 cubic feet.
1933-1944. Pamphlets, articles, and correspondence. Includes pamphlets concerning economics; articles by Morey concerning nutrition and the energy value of diets; and correspondence with J. Lossing Buck, L. A. Maynard, Lydia J. Roberts, Sybil L. Smith, Henry C. Sherman, Hildegard Kneeland, Mary S. Rose, Francis G. Benedict, Helen W. Atwater, Ruth Moore, Thorne M. Carpenter, E. P. Cathcart, F. C. Kelly, Faith M. Williams, Jonnie McCrery, John Leont'Ev, Milicent L. Hathaway, and Helen Canon. Collection material in English 2073483
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
Staff
Date completed:
April 23, 2004
EAD encoding:
Carolyn Smith
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Includes pamphlets concerning economics; articles by Morey concerning nutrition and the energy value of diets; and correspondence with J. Lossing Buck, L. A. Maynard, Lydia J. Roberts, Sybil L. Smith, Henry C. Sherman, Hildegard Kneeland, Mary S. Rose, Francis G. Benedict, Helen W. Atwater, Ruth Moore, Thorne M. Carpenter, E. P. Cathcart, F. C. Kelly, Faith M. Williams, Jonnie McCrery, John Leont'Ev, Milicent L. Hathaway, and Helen Canon.
Cornell University M.S. 1926, Ph.D. 1931.
Cite As:
Nancy Booker Morey papers, #23-14-1465. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Guide to Initials Used in Correspondence
J. Lossing Buck (JLR) -- University of Nanking, but probably written from New York Office, 150 Fifth Avenue
Lydia J. Roberts (LJR) -- Prof. of Home Economics, University of Chicago. Chairman, Dept. of Home Economics
Sybil L. Smith (SLS) -- U.S.D.A., Office of Experiment Stations, Washington. Assistant in Experiment Station Administration
Hildegarde Kneeland (HK) -- Bureau of Home Economics, Washington
Mary S. Rose (MSR) -- Prof. of Nutrition, Teachers College, Columbia University
Henry C. Sherman (HCS) -- Department of Chemistry, Columbia University
Francis G. Benedict (FGB) -- Director of Nutrition Laboratory, Carnegie Institute of Washington, Boston
Helen W. Atwater (HWA) -- Editor, Journal of Home Economics, Washington
Ruth More (RM) -- U.S.D.A., Bureau of Home Economics, Washington
Thorne M. Carpenter (TMC) -- Carnegie Institute of Washington, Boston Nutrition Laboratory
E. P. Cathcart (EPC) -- University of Glasgow, Scotland
F. C. Kelly, Ph.D. (FCK) -- Imperial Bureau of Animal Nutrition, Aberdeen, Scotland
Faith M. Williams (FMW) -- Chief, Cost of Living Division, U.S Dept. of Labor, Washington
Jonnie McCrery (JM) -- Professor, Foods and Nutrition, Texas Technological College, Lubbock, Texas
Milicent L. Hathaway (MLH) -- Prof. of Physiology and Nutrition
Nancy Booker Morey (Mrs. Donald R.) (NBM)
Helen Canon (HC) -- Prof., Economics of Household & Household Management, Cornell University
Biographical / Historical
. Cornell University M.S. 1926, Ph.D. 1931.
Women college teachers. Nutritionists. Nutrition. Economics. Atwater, Helen W. Benedict, Francis G. Buck, John Lossing, 1890-1975. Canon, Helen. Carpenter, Thorne M. Cathcart, E. P. Hathaway, Milicent L. Kelly, F. C. Kneeland, Hildegard. Leont\'Ev, John. Maynard, L. A. McCrery, Jonnie. Moore, Ruth, 1903-1989. Roberts, Lydia J. Rose, Mary S. Sherman, Henry C. Smith, Sybil L. Williams, Faith M.

Reprint from American Economic Review, Vol. XXXIIIFeb. 19191Pamphlet - "Non-Competing Groups," by HJD. Reprint fro Quarterly Journal of Economics, Vol. XLNov. 19221"The War-Tax Paradox," by HJD. Reprint from American Economic Review, Vol. IX, No. 1Mar. 19191Review of Glenn R. Morrow's book, The Ethics of the Wealth of Nations, by HJD with Morrow's reply.
